get.description: Returns agent health status, version, and enabled features. Does not require authentication.

post.description: Creates a new volume from a snapshot. Returns existing on conflict.

get.description: Returns all active NFS exports. Use detail=true for labels. Supports pagination and label filtering.
Returns all snapshots. Use detail=true for full metadata. Supports pagination and label filtering.

post.description: Creates a read-only btrfs snapshot of a volume. Returns existing snapshot on conflict.

get.description: Returns detailed metadata for a single snapshot.

delete.description: Deletes a snapshot and its btrfs subvolume.

get.description: Returns statfs and btrfs device/filesystem statistics.
Returns background tasks. Filter by type. Supports detail, pagination, and label filtering.
Returns detailed metadata for a single background task.

delete.description: Cancels a running or pending background task.

post.description: Creates a background task (scrub or test). Returns 202 Accepted with task ID.

get.description: Returns all volumes. Use detail=true for full metadata. Supports pagination and label filtering.

post.description: Creates a new btrfs subvolume. Returns the existing volume on conflict.
Creates a new volume from another volume (internal snapshot + clone). Returns existing on conflict.

get.description: Returns detailed metadata for a single volume.

delete.description: Deletes a volume and its btrfs subvolume. Fails if the volume has active exports.

patch.description: Patches volume properties. Nil/omitted fields are left unchanged.

post.description: Adds an NFS export for a volume to the given client IP.

delete.description: Removes an NFS export for a volume from the given client IP.

get.description: Returns snapshots for a specific volume. Supports detail, pagination, and label filtering.

quota_bytes.description: Source volume properties, preserved for clone fallback.
